code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)

mut best_idx = -1
mut best_count = 0

mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(ti)
    mut is_first = true
    mut j = 0
    while j < i
      match tokens.get(j)
      when Some(tj)
        if tj == ti
          is_first = false
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if is_first
      mut count = 0
      mut k = 0
      while k < tokens.len()
        match tokens.get(k)
        when Some(tk)
          if tk == ti
            count = count + 1
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      if count > best_count
        best_count = count
        best_idx = i
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

match tokens.get(best_idx)
when Some(t)
  print("top=#{t}=#{best_count}")
when None
  print("top==0")
end
